zh.lifeSummary: 當Reginald de Skipwith於大約1170年出生在英國越可爾斯吉維茲時，他的父親Sir Jeffrey de Skipwith Lord of Skipwith37歲，母親Margery de Manithorp22歲。他於大約1193年與Isabel Bell Aqua在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1252年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾林肯享年83歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Reginald de Skipwith于大约1170年出生在英国越可爾斯吉維茲时，他的父亲Sir Jeffrey de Skipwith Lord of Skipwith37岁，母亲Margery de Manithorp22岁。他于大约1193年与Isabel Bell Aqua在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1252年在英国英格兰林可爾史爾林肯享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Skipwith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: The main Skipwith family held the manor of Skipwith in England in the early Middle Ages, and direct descendants can be traced to the present day. In the 13th century they moved from Yorkshire to Lincolnshire, where their principal seat was at southern Ormsby. In the early 17th century there was further migration, to Leicestershire, Warwickshire, and across the Atlantic to VA. Other bearers of the name seem to have been tenants of Lincolnshire manors held by the Skipworth family, and to have taken the surname of their overlords.

variants.name: Skipworth
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): habitational name from Skipwith (East Yorkshire), from Old Northumbrian scīp (Old English scēap ‘sheep’), + Old English wīc ‘dwelling, specialized farm’, later replaced by Old Norse vithr ‘wood’; initial Sk-, instead of Sh-, is also due to Scandinavian influence.

nameMeanings.name: Reginald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman origin, derived from Reginaldus, a Latinized form of Reynold influenced by Latin regina ‘queen’. The full form is now regarded as very formal, and bearers generally shorten it to Reg in ordinary usage.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Reginald de Skipwith was born about 1170, in Skipwith, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Jeffrey de Skipwith Lord of Skipwith, was 37 and his mother, Margery de Manithorp, was 22. He married Isabel Bell Aqua about 1193, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1252, in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 83.

fr.Skipwith, Yorkshire East Riding, England: Skipwith, Yorkshire East Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Reginald de Skipwith est né environ 1170, à Skipwith, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Jeffrey de Skipwith Lord of Skipwith, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Margery de Manithorp, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Bell Aqua environ 1193, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1252, à Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 83 ans.

de.Skipwith, Yorkshire East Riding, England: Skipwith, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Reginald de Skipwith um 1170 in Skipwith, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Jeffrey de Skipwith Lord of Skipwith 37 und seine Mutter Margery de Manithorp 22. Er hat um 1193 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Isabel Bell Aqua geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1252 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Reginald de Skipwithが約1170年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスキプウィスで生まれた時，父Sir Jeffrey de Skipwith Lord of Skipwithは37歳，母Margery de Manithorpは22歳であった。約1193年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでIsabel Bell Aquaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1252年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアリンコルンで83歳で死去した。

ko.Skipwith, Yorkshire East Riding, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 스키p위스
ko.lifeSummary: Reginald de Skipwith(이)가 대략 1170년 영국 요르크실르 스키p위스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Jeffrey de Skipwith Lord of Skipwith(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery de Manithorp(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1193년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Isabel Bell Aqua(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1252년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 링코컨에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Skipwith, Yorkshire East Riding, England: скипвит, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reginald de Skipwith родился около 1170 г. в местности скипвит, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Jeffrey de Skipwith Lord of Skipwith было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery de Manithorp, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Bell Aqua около 1193 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1252 г. в местности линколн, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 83 лет.
